paths.@repo/icons: DOM-only phosphor SVG package. Use `phosphor-react-native` for icons in the mobile app (ADR-034). Importing `@repo/icons` in React Native crashes with DOM errors.
paths.@repo/auth-ui: DOM React auth forms — not compatible with React Native. Implement native auth screens in apps/mobile/app/(auth)/.
paths.@repo/tailwind-config: CSS/OKLCH tokens for web only. Use the mobile design system in apps/mobile/src/design/ (ADR-034).
